G4368.derivation: feminine of a derivative of G4291 (προΐστημι);

G4378.derivation: from a comparative of G4314 (πρός) and (to pour);

G4308.strongs_def: to behold in advance, i.e. (actively) to notice (another) previously, or (middle voice) to keep in (one's own) view

G4357.strongs_def: to stay further, i.e. remain in a place, with a person; figuratively, to adhere to, persevere in
G4357.kjv_def: abide still, be with, cleave unto, continue in (with)

G4347.strongs_def: to glue to, i.e. (figuratively) to adhere

G4326.strongs_def: to require additionally, i.e. want further

G4329.strongs_def: apprehension (of evil); by implication, infliction anticipated

G4355.strongs_def: to take to oneself, i.e. use (food), lead (aside), admit (to friendship or hospitality)

G4390.derivation: from G4253 (πρό) and G5143 (τρέχω) (including its alternate);
G4390.strongs_def: to run forward, i.e. outstrip, precede

G4303.strongs_def: to be a witness in advance i.e. predict

G4322.strongs_def: to fill up further, i.e. furnish fully

G4369.strongs_def: to place additionally, i.e. lay beside, annex, repeat
G4369.kjv_def: add, again, give more, increase, lay unto, proceed further, speak to any more

G4320.strongs_def: to ascend farther, i.e. be promoted (take an upper (more honorable) seat)

G4377.strongs_def: to sound towards, i.e. address, exclaim, summon

G4372.derivation: from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G4969 (σφάζω);

G4307.strongs_def: forethought, i.e. provident care or supply

G4314.strongs_def: a preposition of direction; forward to, i.e. toward (with the genitive case, the side of, i.e. pertaining to; with the dative case, by the side of, i.e. near to; usually with the accusative case, the place, time, occasion, or respect, which is the destination of the relation, i.e. whither or for which it is predicated)
G4314.kjv_def: about, according to , against, among, at, because of, before, between, (where-)by, for, X at thy house, in, for intent, nigh unto, of, which pertain to, that, to (the end that), X together, to (you) -ward, unto, with(-in)
G4314.usage: unto(340x), to(203x), with(43x), for(25x), against(24x), among(20x), at(11x)

G4383.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and (the visage, from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι));
G4383.strongs_def: the front (as being towards view), i.e. the countenance, aspect, appearance, surface; by implication, presence, person
G4383.kjv_def: (outward) appearance, X before, countenance, face, fashion, (men's) person, presence

G4391.strongs_def: to exist before, i.e. (adverbially) to be or do something previously

G4362.strongs_def: to fasten to, i.e. (specially), to impale (on a cross)

G4348.strongs_def: a stub, i.e. (figuratively) occasion of apostasy

G4388.derivation: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G5087 (τίθημι);
G4388.strongs_def: to place before, i.e. (for oneself) to exhibit; (to oneself) to propose (determine)

G4380.strongs_def: to favor an individual, i.e. show partiality

G4364.derivation: middle voice from G4314 (πρός) and G4160 (ποιέω);
G4364.strongs_def: to do forward for oneself, i.e. pretend (as if about to do a thing)

G4349.strongs_def: a stumbling, i.e. (figuratively and concretely) occasion of sin

G4354.strongs_def: to talk to, i.e. converse with

G4360.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and a form of (to be vexed with something irksome);

G4344.derivation: neuter of a presumed compound of G4314 (πρός) and G2776 (κεφαλή);
G4344.strongs_def: something for the head, i.e. a cushion

G4336.strongs_def: to pray to God, i.e. supplicate, worship

G4374.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and G5342 (φέρω) (including its alternate);
G4374.strongs_def: to bear towards, i.e. lead to, tender (especially to God), treat
G4374.kjv_def: bring (to, unto), deal with, do, offer (unto, up), present unto, put to

G4328.strongs_def: to anticipate (in thought, hope or fear); by implication, to await
G4328.kjv_def: (be in) expect(-ation), look (for), when looked, tarry, wait for

G4350.strongs_def: to strike at, i.e. surge against (as water); specially, to stub on, i.e. trip up (literally or figuratively)

G4345.strongs_def: to give a common lot to, i.e. (figuratively) to associate with

G4311.strongs_def: to send forward, i.e. escort or aid in travel
G4311.kjv_def: accompany, bring (forward) on journey (way), conduct forth

G4358.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and a derivative of the same as G3730 (ὁρμή) (meaning to tie (anchor) or lull);
G4358.strongs_def: to moor to, i.e. (by implication) land at

G4333.strongs_def: to work additionally, i.e. (by implication) acquire besides

G4346.derivation: from a compound of G4314 (πρός) and G2827 (κλίνω);

G4376.strongs_def: presentation; concretely, an oblation (bloodless) or sacrifice

G4363.strongs_def: to fall towards, i.e. (gently) prostrate oneself (in supplication or homage), or (violently) to rush upon (in storm)

G4399.strongs_def: to get an earlier start of, i.e. anticipate

G4332.derivation: from a compound of G4314 (πρός) and the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος);
G4332.strongs_def: to sit near, i.e. attend as a servant

G4398.strongs_def: a female foreteller or an inspired woman

G4366.strongs_def: to tear towards, i.e. burst upon (as a tempest or flood)

G4334.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι) (including its alternate);
G4334.strongs_def: to approach, i.e. (literally) come near, visit, or (figuratively) worship, assent to
G4334.kjv_def: (as soon as he) come (unto), come thereunto, consent, draw near, go (near, to, unto)

G4309.strongs_def: to limit in advance, i.e. (figuratively) predetermine

G4395.strongs_def: to foretell events, divine, speak under inspiration, exercise the prophetic office

G4396.derivation: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G5346 (φημί);
G4396.strongs_def: a foreteller ("prophet"); by analogy, an inspired speaker; by extension, a poet

G4375.derivation: from a presumed compound of G4314 (πρός) and G5368 (φιλέω);

G4379.strongs_def: to impinge, i.e. lay a finger on (in order to relieve)

G4389.derivation: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and the base of G5157 (τροπή);
G4389.strongs_def: to turn forward for oneself, i.e. encourage

G4365.strongs_def: to journey towards, i.e. approach (not the same as G4313 (προπορεύομαι))

G4339.strongs_def: an arriver from a foreign region, i.e. (specially), an acceder (convert) to Judaism ("proselyte")

G4302.strongs_def: to say beforehand, i.e. predict, forewarn

G4337.strongs_def: (figuratively) to hold the mind (3563 implied) towards, i.e. pay attention to, be cautious about, apply oneself to, adhere to
G4337.kjv_def: (give) attend(-ance, -ance at, -ance to, unto), beware, be given to, give (take) heed (to unto); have regard

G4385.strongs_def: to protend, i.e. tie prostrate (for scourging)

G4386.derivation: neuter of G4387 (πρότερος) as adverb (with or without the article);

G4338.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and a derivative of G2247 (ἧλος);
G4338.strongs_def: to peg to, i.e. spike fast

G4341.derivation: middle voice from G4314 (πρός) and G2564 (καλέω);
G4341.strongs_def: to call toward oneself, i.e. summon, invite

G4361.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and the same as G3983 (πεινάω);

G4392.derivation: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G5316 (φαίνω);

G4317.strongs_def: to lead towards, i.e. (transitively) to conduct near (summon, present), or (intransitively) to approach

G4306.strongs_def: to consider in advance, i.e. look out for beforehand (actively, by way of maintenance for others; middle voice by way of circumspection for oneself)

G4342.strongs_def: to be earnest towards, i.e. (to a thing) to persevere, be constantly diligent, or (in a place) to attend assiduously all the exercises, or (to a person) to adhere closely to (as a servitor)
G4342.kjv_def: attend (give self) continually (upon), continue (in, instant in, with), wait on (continually)

G4340.strongs_def: for the occasion only, i.e. temporary
G4340.kjv_def: dur-(eth) for awhile, endure for a time, for a season, temporal

G4381.strongs_def: an accepter of a face (individual), i.e. (specially), one exhibiting partiality

G4316.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and a derivative of G58 (ἀγορά) (mean to harangue);
G4316.strongs_def: to address, i.e. salute by name

G4327.strongs_def: to admit (to intercourse, hospitality, credence, or (figuratively) endurance); by implication, to await (with confidence or patience)

G4351.strongs_def: to roll towards, i.e. block against

G4312.derivation: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G4098 (πίπτω);

G4352.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and a probable derivative of G2965 (κύων) (meaning to kiss, like a dog licking his master's hand);
G4352.strongs_def: to fawn or crouch to, i.e. (literally or figuratively) prostrate oneself in homage (do reverence to, adore)

G4371.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of a compound of G4314 (πρός) and G5315 (φάγω);
G4371.strongs_def: something eaten in addition to bread, i.e. a relish (specially, fish; compare G3795 (ὀψάριον))

G4301.strongs_def: to take in advance, i.e. (literally) eat before others have an opportunity; (figuratively) to anticipate, surprise

G4323.strongs_def: to lay up in addition, i.e. (middle voice and figuratively) to impart or (by implication) to consult

G4370.derivation: from G4314 (πρός) and G5143 (τρέχω) (including its alternate);
G4370.strongs_def: to run towards, i.e. hasten to meet or join
